text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Arima Kinen. This time, Seiun
Sky is drawing most of the crowd's attention, not
to mention that of the other racers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yet, despite the situation and knowing how
skilled Grass Wonder and the other opponents
are, Seiun Sky laughs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We enjoy thinking up strategies to conquer the
other formidable runners. Seiun Sky heads off to
the track, still mulling over some ideas.
